# Project Instructions for GitHub CopilotThis repository is for building a prototype web application that evaluates the business case for automation and robotics technologies in EPC construction projects.## Business ContextThe target users are construction technology, project execution, quality, and management teams in an Oil & Gas EPC company.The application should help users compare automation and robotics technologies by calculating:- CAPEX- OPEX- Annual productivity benefit- Labor cost saving- Schedule reduction benefit- Quality or rework reduction benefit- Net annual benefit- Payback period- Priority ranking## Development Principles- Keep the first version simple and practical.- Use clear variable names that business users can understand.- Separate calculation logic from UI components.- Do not hard-code business assumptions inside UI components.- Use sample data that does not include confidential company information.- Add comments for important business formulas.- Prefer readable code over overly clever code.- Validate all numeric inputs.- Show calculation assumptions clearly to the user.## Output StyleThe UI should be suitable for EPC management review.Use concise labels, simple tables, and clear summary cards.## TestingAdd unit tests for ROI and payback calculation logic.Include edge cases such as zero CAPEX, zero annual benefit, negative benefit, and missing inputs.
